creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Alexandre C. Guimarães from comment #1)
This is wrong.  Please revert and use the tarball they publish instead.
We should always use them when upstream has taken the time to actually create
them.  They have pregenerated configure scripts and other goodies.

There was a thread on the OpenBSD ports mailing list about this as well.
This applies to FreeBSD too.

https://marc.info/?l=openbsd-ports&m=151973450514279&w=2
